ItacAcademyItem.Name: Inoltrati (Accademia degli)
ItacAcademyItem.EmblemDescription: Reflection of sun in the water
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: Probably created by Gianfrancesco Loredan, before the Incogniti.
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
